codeReview.summary: The worker's commit (dd792a0) is narrowly scoped and correct: it fixes two non-responsive grid classes in ProfilePage.tsx (grid-cols-2 → grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2) and adds a comprehensive 16-test suite for ProfilePage covering profile view/update, MFA setup/activate/disable, error states, and responsive layout assertions. All surrounding features (portal hub, command palette, breadcrumbs, sidebar navigation, session keepalive, logout, portal routing) were already implemented by prior workers and were verified via agent-browser interactive checks in the handoff. The code is well-structured, follows project conventions (CSS variables, Tailwind utilities, design system components), and all 163 tests in the auth area pass cleanly with TypeScript zero errors.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker skill procedure assumes most features need implementation from scratch. When a worker inherits a feature that is already mostly implemented by a prior session, the skill's step-by-step implementation guidance can be unnecessary overhead. The worker noted this in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges: 'The skill procedure should clarify that when most features are pre-implemented, the worker should focus on finding and fixing remaining gaps (like responsive grid issues) rather than re-implementing everything from scratch.'

sharedStateObservations.observation: The password section in ProfilePage uses the Camera icon (line 588, originally from template), which is semantically incorrect for a password section. A Lock or KeyRound icon would be more appropriate. This is a pre-existing issue, not introduced by this commit, but worth noting.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/pages/auth/ProfilePage.tsx line 588: `import { Camera, ShieldCheck, ShieldOff, User as UserIcon, KeyRound, Copy, Check } from 'lucide-react'` — Camera icon used for Password section header

summary: PASS. The worker's commit is well-scoped: it fixes the responsive grid bug in ProfilePage (2 lines changed) and adds 16 comprehensive tests (402 lines). All pre-existing features in scope (portal hub role filtering, command palette with Cmd/Ctrl+K, breadcrumbs, mobile sidebar drawer, 4-minute session keepalive, logout clearing localStorage, portal routing with superadmin isolation) were already implemented and verified via 14 interactive agent-browser checks documented in the handoff. TypeScript compiles cleanly and all 163 auth-related tests pass. No blocking issues found.
